task_completion.description: Verify the parent account 'Siemens AG' was created with the correct industry and city.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an account record or list view showing 'Siemens AG' with Industry set to 'Manufacturing' and Billing City set to 'Munich'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subsidiary account 'Siemens Healthineers' was created with the correct industry and city.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an account record or list view showing 'Siemens Healthineers' with Industry set to 'Healthcare' and Billing City set to 'Erlangen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subsidiary account 'Siemens Digital Industries' was created with the correct industry and city.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an account record or list view showing 'Siemens Digital Industries' with Industry set to 'Technology' and Billing City set to 'Nuremberg'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subsidiary account 'Siemens Mobility' was created with the correct industry and city.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an account record or list view showing 'Siemens Mobility' with Industry set to 'Transportation' and Billing City set to 'Munich'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all three subsidiary accounts are correctly linked to the parent account 'Siemens AG'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Member of' field on the subsidiary account detail pages showing 'Siemens AG', OR look at the 'Siemens AG' account detail page's 'Member Organizations' subpanel listing the three subsidiaries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SuiteCRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CRM's 'Create Account' forms being filled out or the final saved account detail views, rather than text pasted into a notepad or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels open that suggest the DOM was manually altered to display the expected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Account: 'Siemens AG' (Industry: Manufacturing, City: Munich). Subsidiaries: 1. 'Siemens Healthineers' (Industry: Healthcare, City: Erlangen). 2. 'Siemens Digital Industries' (Industry: Technology, City: Nuremberg). 3. 'Siemens Mobility' (Industry: Transportation, City: Munich). All three subsidiaries must have 'Siemens AG' set as their 'Member of' parent account.
